stemHtml:
You’re landing at London City Airport that has runway 27 in use, what visibility can be expected If haze is reported?

METAR EGLC 231720 260/10kt 3000 HZ NSW

options.a: Less than 3000 m but not less than 1500 m.
options.c: Less than 5000 m but more than 1500 m.
options.d: Less than 3000 m, but in the direction of landing, probably less than 1500 m.
